title: MobAwareness
description: A Minecraft mod that makes mobs more intelligent and reactive to players, light, and sound.
body:
# Mob Awareness

A Minecraft mod that makes mobs more intelligent and reactive to players, light, and sound.

## Features

*   **Attracted to Light:** Player-placed artificial light (torches, lanterns, etc.) attracts monsters at night.
*   **Sound Detection:** Mobs can hear and investigate player-generated sounds like mining, block placing, jumping, sprinting, and combat.
*   **Base Sieges:** Mobs will gather around and approach player bases at night if players are inside.

***

![](https://domkss-public-hosted-images.s3.eu-north-1.amazonaws.com/mob_awareness_1.gif) ![](https://domkss-public-hosted-images.s3.eu-north-1.amazonaws.com/mob_awareness_2.gif)

***

## Customization

All features are fully configurable. You can:
*   Enable or disable each behavior for specific mobs (zombies, skeletons, creepers, etc.).
*   Adjust detection ranges, response chances, and other numerical values.
*   Fine-tune the mod to your preferred playstyle and difficulty.

---


## Modpack Permission
Feel free to use this mod in any modpack.
